phrases.intent_en: Ask where the neoclassical fountain is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a fonte neoclássica do jardim?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-ka ah-FON-chee ne-o-KLA-see-ka doo-zhar-DEEN [liaison: ah-FON, doo-zhar]
phrases.cultural_note: Neoclassical fountains in Alentejo parks symbolize 19th-century urban modernization and water management.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao caminho principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW kuh-MEE-nyoo preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's situated next to the main walkway.

responses.english: Good morning, it's situated next to the main walkway.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW kuh-MEE-nyoo preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao caminho principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the General statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a estátua do general?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH SHTAH-toouh DOO zheh-nih-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Statues in Portuguese gardens often honor regional military figures, reflecting local civic pride.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Estátua do General.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SHTAH-toouh DOO zheh-nih-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the General statue.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the General statue.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SHTAH-toouh DOO zheh-nih-RAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Estátua do General.

phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o coreto de ferro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW koo-REH-too DIH FEH-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The iron bandstand hosts traditional summer concerts, a staple of Portuguese public parks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no centro do jardim.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's located in the center of the garden.

responses.english: Good morning, it's located in the center of the garden.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica no centro do jardim.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the neoclassical fountain is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a fonte neoclássica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH FOHNG-tih neeook-LAH-see-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: A fonte é um marco histórico central.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a fonte neoclássica.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih neeook-LAH-see-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the neoclassical fountain.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the neoclassical fountain.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih neeook-LAH-see-kuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a fonte neoclássica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the General statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a estátua do General?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH SHTAH-toouh DOO zheh-nih-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: A estátua homenageia uma figura militar local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the General statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Estátua do General?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SHTAH-toouh DOO zheh-nih-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Local guides often emphasize the statue's historical significance to Évora's military heritage.

likely_response.local: A Estátua do General encontra-se no jardim; siga as placas indicativas ou dirija-se ao balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH SHTAH-toouh DOO zheh-nih-RAHL ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN; SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh een-dee-kuh-TEE-vuhsh OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: The General Statue is in the garden; follow the signs or go to the information desk.

responses.english: The General Statue is in the garden; follow the signs or go to the information desk.
responses.phonetic: AH SHTAH-toouh DOO zheh-nih-RAHL ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN; SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh een-dee-kuh-TEE-vuhsh OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: A Estátua do General encontra-se no jardim; siga as placas indicativas ou dirija-se ao balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central duck pond is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o lago central com os patos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW LAH-goo sayngt-RAHL KOHM OOSH PAH-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Feeding ducks is a cherished local weekend tradition, though visitors are advised to use proper bird feed.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o lago central com patos fica na zona central do parque, onde também se encontram o coreto de ferro e a fonte neoclássica.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW LAH-goo sayngt-RAHL KOHM PAH-toosh FEE-kuh NUH ZOH-nuh sayngt-RAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih, OHNG-dih tahnm-BAYNG SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruhng AW koo-REH-too DIH FEH-roo EH AH FOHNG-tih neeook-LAH-see-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the central duck pond is located in the central area of the park, where you can also find the iron bandstand and the neoclassical fountain.

responses.english: Good morning, the central duck pond is located in the central area of the park, where you can also find the iron bandstand and the neoclassical fountain.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW LAH-goo sayngt-RAHL KOHM PAH-toosh FEE-kuh NUH ZOH-nuh sayngt-RAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih, OHNG-dih tahnm-BAYNG SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruhng AW koo-REH-too DIH FEH-roo EH AH FOHNG-tih neeook-LAH-see-kuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, o lago central com patos fica na zona central do parque, onde também se encontram o coreto de ferro e a fonte neoclássica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the neoclassical fountain is
phrases.cultural_note: A fonte neoclássica é um dos pontos de referência no jardim.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Acácias walkway is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra o Passeio das Acácias?
phrases.cultural_note: Tree-lined promenades like this are classic Alentejo park features, designed for leisurely evening strolls.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado da fonte neoclássica.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DUH FOHNG-tih neeook-LAH-see-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's located next to the neoclassical fountain.

responses.english: Good morning, it's located next to the neoclassical fountain.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DUH FOHNG-tih neeook-LAH-see-kuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado da fonte neoclássica.
